headline: The $42 Trillion Oil Opportunity Hiding in Plain Sight
summary: A new oil boom may not come from new discoveries. Advanced recovery technology could unlock hundreds of billions of barrels already trapped in existing fields

headline: Citi Sticks with Buy on Baker Hughes (BKR) Despite Lowering Price Target
summary: Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) is included among Billionaire Larry Robbins’ 10 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 3, Citi lowered its price recommendation on Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) to $74 from $80. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The revision came as the firm updated its models for companies in the oil and gas […]
